evidence: Paper analyzes magnetar giant flare GRB 200415A toward NGC 253 and characterizes its phases, energetics, and timing.
First clean detection of kHz QPOs in the main burst peak of a magnetar giant flare; extends the QPO concept beyond tail-phase observations.
Observed QPO frequencies, ~3.5 ms QPO lifetime, and coincident rise of non-thermal emission match magnetospheric Alfven-wave reconnection predictions.
